body:
## Rationale

`/technique/<slug>/drummers` pages (10 pages) received SSR meta titles/descriptions via #1202 (shipped). They also have per-technique LLM markdown via #1215 (shipped). However, they have **zero FAQPage JSON-LD structured data**.

Technique pages serve a distinct query intent:
- "what is a blast beat" (informational — FAQPage direct answer)
- "how to play double bass" (how-to)  
- "best blast beat drummers" (list/PAA)
- "what is gravity blast technique" (definition)

FAQPage schema would make these answers directly eligible for PAA boxes and AI citation, compounding the already-shipping LLM content.

## Technique pages covered

From `api/sitemap.js:116-127`:
- blast-beat, double-bass, gravity-blast, polyrhythms, odd-time-signatures
- one-handed-roll, triggered-drums, groove-drumming, linear-drumming, fill-techniques

## Fix

**File:** `api/meta/[...path].js`

Add FAQPage to the existing `/technique/<slug>/drummers` handler (around line 344):

```js
// In the technique+drummers handler, add a FAQPage:
const techniqueFAQ = {
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'FAQPage',
  mainEntity: [
    {
      '@type': 'Question',
      name: `What is ${technique.name}?`,
      acceptedAnswer: {
        '@type': 'Answer',
        text: technique.description || `${technique.name} is a metal drumming technique used by many legendary metal drummers.`,
      },
    },
    {
      '@type': 'Question',
      name: `Which metal drummers are best known for ${technique.name}?`,
      acceptedAnswer: {
        '@type': 'Answer',
        text: `See the complete list of metal drummers known for ${technique.name} on MetalForge, including gear setups and performance videos.`,
      },
    },
    {
      '@type': 'Question',
      name: `What gear do you need for ${technique.name}?`,
      acceptedAnswer: {
        '@type': 'Answer',
        text: `The gear requirements for ${technique.name} vary by drummer. Browse MetalForge for complete kit specs from pros who use this technique.`,
      },
    },
  ],
};

// Add articleSchema: JSON.stringify(techniqueFAQ) to the return block
```

Requires `technique.description` to exist in the techniques data; if not, use a safe fallback string.

**File to check for description field:** `packages/frontend/data/techniques.js`

## Quality gate

- 10 technique pages × 3 FAQ questions each = 30 FAQPage entries
- All questions are factual, grounded in the technique name
- Schema.org FAQPage spec: https://schema.org/FAQPage
- No conflict with existing SSR meta (FAQPage is additive, not replacing title/description)

## Expected uplift

- PAA box eligibility for "what is [technique]" queries
- AI-citation anchors for technique definition queries (Perplexity, ChatGPT)
- Compounds with per-technique LLM markdown (#1215, shipped) and per-technique SSR meta (#1202)

## Verify

1. `curl -A "Googlebot" https://metalforge.io/api/meta/technique/blast-beat/drummers` → JSON-LD contains `"@type": "FAQPage"`
2. Question "What is Blast Beat?" present in FAQPage entities
3. Existing SSR title/description still present (no regression to #1202)
4. Schema validates at https://validator.schema.org
5. Check both `/technique/blast-beat/drummers` AND `/technique/double-bass/drummers` for consistency

## Done

- [ ] FAQPage JSON-LD added to the `/technique/<slug>/drummers` handler
- [ ] All 10 technique pages return FAQPage with definition + drummers + gear questions
- [ ] No regression to existing SSR meta from #1202
title: SEO batch: FAQPage JSON-LD on technique pages (~10 pages)
